claim: The Earth revolves around the Sun.
reasoning: Analyzed 6 evidence sources. Support: 24%, Refute: 29%, Neutral: 27%. Weak evidence suggests this claim may be inaccurate. Low confidence (29%). Further verification recommended. LLM verifier (groq) reason: All provided evidence from reputable scientific sources (NASA, Britannica, educational materials) explicitly states that Earth orbits/revolves around the Sun, aligning with the well‑established heliocentric model accepted by the scientific community..
